scripts.test: npm run test:extension && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:extension: node extension/tests/test_snapshot.js && node extension/tests/test_fill.js && node extension/tests/test_combobox.js && node extension/tests/test_overlay.js && node extension/tests/test_dropcatch.js
scripts.test:frontend: node frontend/tests/test_safe_href.js && node frontend/tests/test_ledger.js && node frontend/tests/test_foundry.js
